studies.title: Cara Care for Reflux and Functional Dyspepsia - Evaluation of positive effects for patients with gastroesophageal reflux disease in a non-invasive, prospective, two-arm, randomized study with parallel group design - CARE-R study

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Cara Care for Reflux and Functional Dyspepsia', which is a different product from 'Cara Care für Reizdarm'. The study focuses on gastroesophageal reflux disease and functional dyspepsia, not irritable bowel syndrome.

studies.title: Cara Care for Reflux and Functional Dyspepsia - Evaluation of positive effects for patients with functional dyspepsia in a non-invasive, prospective, two-arm, randomized study with parallel group design - CARE-D study

_verification.reason: The study is about 'Cara Care for Reflux and Functional Dyspepsia', which is a different product from 'Cara Care für Reizdarm'. The study focuses on conditions like gastroesophageal reflux disease and functional dyspepsia, not irritable bowel syndrome.
